meaning: n.媒体,方法,媒介adj.中间的,中等的,半生熟的
examples: There are three sizes—small, medium and large.
A medium dose produces severe nausea within hours.
Video is a good medium for learning a foreign language.
Both firms had one project coordinator overseeing a calling agent selling customer-relations software to medium-size businesses.
The two giants see their fastest growth coming from small and medium-size businesses in the years ahead.
